# @platform/email-runtime

Email service abstraction: send interface, template contracts, and delivery provider interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/email-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: email-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: email-service
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed email send interface and message payload schema
- Declare template contract types for transactional and marketing emails
- Specify delivery provider interface that concrete adapters must implement
- Decouple all platform and feature packages from specific email providers

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement email delivery (owned by adapters-brevo)
- Does not manage unsubscribe lists or email preference state
- Does not define email template markup or rendering

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by feature packages to trigger transactional emails
- adapters-brevo implements the provider interface defined here

## Operational notes

- Provider interface decouples the platform from a specific email vendor — swapping requires only a new adapter
- Template IDs should be treated as stable contracts — verify before renaming
